name: Developmental Language Disorder - Diagnosis Code Query (Multi-Code)
description: Tests ability to find DLD patients across the 3 PheKB-published ICD-10 inclusion codes (F80.1, F80.2, F80.89). Per APT-DLD algorithm (Walters et al. 2020), real-world cohorts use multiple subtype codes — F80.89 most broadly, F80.2 for mixed presentations, F80.1 for expressive-only.
prompt: Find pediatric patients with a diagnosis of developmental language disorder including expressive, receptive-expressive, and other developmental disorders of speech and language.

prompts.broad: Find pediatric patients diagnosed with developmental language disorder — including expressive, mixed receptive-expressive, and other developmental disorders of speech and language.
prompts.expert: Search Condition for ICD-10 F80.1 (Expressive language disorder), F80.2 (Mixed receptive-expressive language disorder), F80.89 (Other developmental disorders of speech and language). Restrict to pediatric. Query: Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|F80.1,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|F80.2,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|F80.89

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Pediatric patients with any DLD inclusion code (PheKB APT-DLD algorithm, Step 1 Broad Search).

required_codes.display: Other developmental disorders of speech and language
